notes.must_gather_docs_dir: Path to must-gather documentation directory (MUST_GATHER_*.md files). Relative paths are resolved from the project root. Default: DataSource
notes.max_chunk_tokens: RCA chunking budget for large must-gathers (default 80000). Increase if the orchestrating LLM supports a larger context window.
notes.max_iterations: Maximum tool-call iterations for the ReAct agent loop (default: 25)
notes.max_deepening_rounds: Maximum deepening rounds HIGH -> MEDIUM -> LOW (default: 3)
